name: cognee
description: CLI-first Cognee workflows for memory, knowledge graphs, codebase ingestion, and local UI launch.

interface.shortDescription: Use Cognee from Codex through the cognee CLI.
interface.longDescription: Reusable Codex skills for running Cognee's CLI workflows: configure local or cloud Cognee, remember and recall knowledge, ingest codebases, manage datasets, and launch the local UI with cognee-cli -ui. This plugin intentionally does not configure MCP.
defaultPrompt: Use Cognee CLI to remember the important context in this repo.
Use Cognee CLI to recall what we know about this feature.
Launch the local Cognee UI with the CLI and check its health.
